name: Beef and Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large heavy pot with lid. Trim meat of all fat and cut into 1-inch cubes. Brown beef on all sides.
2. Add vegetables (except cabbage), sliced into pieces approximately the same size, and add 5 cups water. Cover and simmer for 1-1/2 hours, adding more water if needed.
3. Slice cabbage and add to pot along with salt and pepper. Simmer for 20-25 minutes longer.
